title: Campaign Monitor vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Campaign Monitor and Sendinblue email marketing tools. Pricing, features, and recommendations for your business needs.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs Sendinblue: Detailed Comparison
intro: Campaign Monitor and Sendinblue (now Brevo) serve different email marketing needs. Campaign Monitor excels at multi-brand management for agencies, while Sendinblue offers a comprehensive all-in-one platform with SMS, chat, and CRM capabilities. This comparison helps you choose the right tool based on your business requirements and budget.

comparison_table.tool_a: Template builder, journey designer, smart segments, multi-brand management, analytics, transactional email
comparison_table.tool_b: SMS, WhatsApp, transactional API, chat, CRM, email marketing, 300 free emails/day

choose_a_if: You manage multiple brands or client accounts and need dedicated multi-brand management features
You prioritize email-specific tools with advanced journey designer and segmentation capabilities
You work in an agency environment with sophisticated campaign workflows
choose_b_if: You want a free tier to test the platform before committing financially
You need an all-in-one solution combining email, SMS, WhatsApp, chat, and CRM functionality
You frequently send transactional emails and want a robust transactional API included

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than Sendinblue?
faq.a: Neither is objectively better; it depends on your needs. Campaign Monitor is superior for agencies managing multiple brands with advanced email workflows. Sendinblue excels for businesses wanting an all-in-one CRM platform with email, SMS, and chat capabilities. Sendinblue has higher customer satisfaction ratings (4.5 vs 4.1 on G2) and a free tier, making it more accessible for startups.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue is significantly cheaper for beginners and small businesses, offering a free tier with 300 emails per day and up to 100,000 subscribers at no cost. Campaign Monitor requires a minimum $11/month investment with no free trial. For larger businesses, paid plans start at $25/month for Sendinblue versus $11/month for Campaign Monitor, but total cost depends on subscriber count and feature requirements.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, most email marketing platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists and campaign data. However, you'll need to manually recreate automation workflows, templates, and segments in Campaign Monitor. Consider using migration services or consulting each platform's support team for guidance on transferring your account information seamlessly.
